case_title: SANDRA LYNCH VS. DORATRIZ CERVANTES PADILLA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, DORATRIZ CERVANTES , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FRUNITURE GALORE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
